title: La grande strada azzurra
writer: Franco Solinas, Ennio De Concini, Gillo Pontecorvo
actors: Yves Montand, Alida Valli, Francisco Rabal
plot: Squarciò, a fisherman, lives with his family on a small island off the Dalmatian coast of Italy. Like his fellow villagers, Squarciò struggles against harsh living conditions, a scarcity of fish in nearby waters and exploitation b...
